heading: Sunday Night
text: Mostly clear, with some passing clouds. More clouds arriving after midnight. Lows through the 40s, nearing 50 in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Monday
text: Sun, mixing with clouds. Warm. Chance of morning showers to the north. Highs from the mid 70s to near 80 in the northeast, from the upper 70s to mid 80s south and west.

heading: Monday Night
text: Partly cloudy and mild. Chance of a stray shower in the Saint Lawrence Valley. Lows in the 50s to low 60s.
